creator: blacktravelpin
caption:
🎉 CELEBRATING YOUR BIRTHDAY IN DUBAI? 

Here are 15+ real freebies you can actually get — from cake & coffee to brunch, brownies, and even waterparks 🥳💸

…but read this first 👇

✅ Some are 100% confirmed – like Starbucks, Paul, Wagamama & Cinemacity

⚠️ Others need apps, group bookings, or a minimum spend

❗Always call ahead – or risk showing up cake-less 😅

🇦🇪 UAE Residents get extra perks with Emirates ID

Confirmed & widely available:
☕ Starbucks – Free drink (with app)

🍰 Paul Bakery – Free cake slice (loyalty program)

🍜 Wagamama – Free main course (select locations)

🎬 Cinemacity – Free movie ticket (birthday registration)

🍩 Dunkin’ – Birthday treat (with app)

🎁 Tim Hortons – Free coffee + donut (with app)

🍮 The Coffee Club – Free dessert (with membership)

🥐 Marks & Spencer – Free coffee + pastry & 20% off clothing

🍫 Reform Social & Grill – Free brownie

🍽️ Absolute Barbecues – Free cake & buffet (usually with group)

💵 Carluccio’s – AED 50 off (via app or email)

🎂 The Scene by Simon Rimmer – Free dessert (ask staff)

🥤 Bubee Drinks – Buy 1 Get 1 Free

🍽️ Secret Parties – Free brunch on your birthday (select venues)

🎟️ Atlantis Waterpark / Wild Wadi – Free entry for UAE residents (Emirates ID required)

📝 Always call ahead & check conditions. Some require ID, apps or pre-booking.

Tip: Mention it’s your birthday before you order

Tag your birthday buddy 🎂

Save this for later 💛

Follow @blacktravelpin for more Dubai Tips. 😍
